title: Skeleton
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Skeleton helper using cn.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Skeleton helper using cn.

registry.reason: shadcn Skeleton uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provides Effect Schema options for the helper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: The Card example is represented by fixture-local static Card shell classes until shadcn/card is implemented.
Origin language selector runtime dependency is replaced by local RTL example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: SkeletonAvatar
SkeletonCard
examples.description: Card loading placeholder using example-local Card shell classes.
examples.distinguishes: Card loading placeholder using example-local Card shell classes.
examples.snippet:
export const SkeletonCard = (): Html =>
  Card([
    CardHeader([skeleton('h-4 w-2/3'), skeleton('h-4 w-1/2')]),
    CardContent([skeleton('aspect-video w-full')]),
  ])

deviations.summary: Card example uses fixture-local static Card shell classes instead of an installable shadcn Card component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/card as an installable registry item. The local Card shell preserves the origin DOM slots and base-nova classes used by the Skeleton Card example.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL constants preserve the default rendered direction while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
